data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: An extra layer of security that requires users to provide a PIN in addition to SMS-based authentication.
data.technical_spec: Users can set up a six-digit PIN that is required when registering a phone number with WhatsApp again.

data.title: Encrypted Backups
data.description: WhatsApp offers encrypted backups to make stored messages secure from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Users can encrypt their backups with a password or a 64-digit encryption key.

data.title: Security Notifications
data.description: WhatsApp alerts users when the security code of a contact changes for improved transparency.
data.technical_spec: This feature helps users ensure that conversations remain encrypted and contact identity is verified.

data.title: Automatic Security Updates
data.description: WhatsApp automatically deploys security patches to protect users against emerging threats.
data.technical_spec: This is achieved through server updates and application upgrades across platforms.

data.title: Report Spam and Block
data.description: Users can report and block contacts or messages suspected to be spam or malicious.
data.technical_spec: When a number is reported, WhatsApp collects a user's recent interaction metadata to analyze.
